landing.founding_card_body: The first 100 founding members get full access to Robot Meta + Robot Crypto at no cost, until live track record publishes Q3 2026.
landing.beta_section_title: Early access — free for the first 100 traders.
landing.beta_section_subtitle: We are in beta. Live track record publishes after 90 days of production operation. Until then, founding members get full access at no cost — in exchange for direct feedback into our roadmap.
landing.beta_bullet_full_access: Full access to Robot Meta MT5 + Robot Crypto Binance
landing.beta_bullet_demo: MT5 demo + Binance Testnet — try first, no risk
landing.beta_card_body: No monthly fees, no minimum deposit. Capital stays in your broker or Binance account — we never custody funds.
landing.beta_slot_note: Limited slots. Manual verification by our team.
landing.products_subtitle_fallback: Automated trading engines for two asset classes, built on the same 12-layer risk framework. Pick the one that fits your capital and risk profile.
landing.track_record_beta_title: Beta phase — track record live after 90 days of operation.
landing.track_record_beta_subtitle: We only publish equity statements and KPIs after production has been live ≥90 days. No fake numbers.
landing.pillars_subtitle: Every trade passes through intelligence, execution, and risk control — in that order, every time.
landing.risk_subtitle: Risk control isn't a feature — it's the substrate every strategy runs on.
landing.pricing_subtitle: Three engagement models, each designed for a different type of capital.
landing.trust_subtitle: Testimonials aren't shown yet — founding member slots just opened. Until then, trust stands on technology, partners, and our discipline.
landing.trust_invite_body: Founding members feedback flows directly into our engineering roadmap.

landing.cta_title: The next step is a conversation.

landing.cta_no_pressure: No commitment. No fee. No high-pressure sales.

hero.title: Quantitative trading, systematized.
hero.subtitle: AI infrastructure that executes market decisions 24 hours with institutional precision.

performance_page.hero_subtitle_live: Live data from the production account, updated every 4 hours. Equity statements + audit logs available on request for institutional clients.
performance_page.hero_subtitle_beta: We're in beta phase. Rather than display simulated numbers as a "track record", we hold off publishing until we have 90 days of real production operation. In the meantime, methodology transparency below.
performance_page.equity_source_db: Internal production database · forex + crypto backend
performance_page.method_body: Before publication, we have already prepared all the tracking infrastructure that will eventually appear on this page. The four pillars below are running every second in our production stack.
performance_page.pillar_equity_desc: Every closed trade is logged with timestamp + execution price. The equity curve is built from broker data, not internal simulation.
performance_page.pillar_session_desc: P&L per session (Asia / Europe / US) + per weekday. Helps clients understand when the bot contributes most to their portfolio.
performance_page.pillar_audit_desc: Every entry has a rationale: confidence score, triggering indicator, slippage, and close reason. Available to All-In tier + Institutional clients.
performance_page.pillar_verify_desc: Equity statements are reconciled against partner broker statements quarterly. Internal production database (forex + crypto backend) is the source of truth. Verification access available on request during institutional client briefings.
performance_page.verify_title: Trust isn't built on claims alone
performance_page.verify_body: Every figure we eventually publish comes from direct broker data + third-party audit. Briefing clients receive independent verification access to the production equity log.
performance_page.verify_card1_desc: Track record built directly from our forex + crypto backend databases. Every trade is logged with timestamp, execution price, and rationale. Single source of truth for audit.
performance_page.verify_card2_desc: Execution via Exness — partner broker with FCA, CySEC, and FSCA licenses. Broker statements available on request for institutional clients as an independent cross-check.
performance_page.verify_card3_desc: Performance data is reconciled quarterly against broker statements + on-chain proof for Robot Crypto. Mismatches ≥0.1% are fully investigated and documented.
performance_page.risk_body: Past performance does not guarantee future results. Trading financial instruments involves substantial risk and may result in partial or total loss of capital. High leverage cuts both ways — for you and against you. Make sure you understand your risk profile before activating any tier.
performance_page.cta_title: Want to see the full detail?
performance_page.cta_body: 30-minute briefing to discuss methodology, audit log access, and fit with your portfolio profile.

performance.title: Verified Performance
performance.subtitle: Live data from production account. Updated every 4 hours.

pricing_page.hero_disclaimer: Zero-custody · You hold capital in your own broker / Binance account
pricing_page.signal_subtitle: The bot executes directly in your MT5 account via ZeroMQ bridge. Capital stays in your partner broker (Exness) account — we never custody funds.
signal_t2_features: Advanced SMC + Wyckoff + AI Momentum indicators
pricing_page.crypto_subtitle: You hold the Binance API key (Read + Trade scope, no Withdraw permission). Capital stays in your Binance account. Profit share is deducted from realized PnL monthly.
pricing_page.vps_subtitle: Full configuration, full control, on your own server. Built for serious traders who need deep customization.
pricing_page.apis_subtitle_prefix: REST + WebSocket with per-tier rate limits. API key issued after payment. For full schemas and technical integration, contact
pricing_page.inst_title: API access + Backtest as a Service
pricing_page.inst_subtitle_part1: For trading firms, family offices, and high-net-worth individuals.
pricing_page.inst_subtitle_part2: — we remain zero-custody. What we provide: API integration, white-label tech, backtest engine on-demand.
pricing_page.demo_body: Before paying for any tier, try our signals on an MT5 demo account. Indicator confluence is also available free for discretionary traders. Not counted in live track record, no time limit on evaluation.

solutions_crypto.hero_subtitle: The same SMC + Wyckoff + Momentum strategies professionals use, executed by a 24/7 bot on Binance Spot + USDT-M Futures. You hold the API key — we cannot withdraw your funds. Capital stays in your Binance account.
solutions_crypto.hero_beta_note: Currently in beta. Free access for founding members through the 90-day live track record (Q3 2026). The pricing tiers below take effect after beta.
solutions_crypto.feat1_desc: Smart Money Concepts, Wyckoff Method, and momentum continuation. 6 independent strategies with confluence scoring on the backend.
solutions_crypto.feat2_desc: Funds always sit in your Binance. The bot only executes trades — it cannot withdraw because permissions are restricted to Read + Trade.
solutions_crypto.feat3_desc: Crypto markets don't sleep — neither does the bot. Every second the bot scans the order book, indicators, and macro conditions across timeframes.
solutions_crypto.feat4_desc: Tier-based leverage cap (5x → 15x), ATR-based liquidation buffer, daily loss limit, self-serve and operator-grade kill switches.
solutions_crypto.feat5_desc: Direct REST + WebSocket to the Binance Futures API. Order routing with a per-strategy calibratable slippage budget.
solutions_crypto.feat6_desc: API keys encrypted via a Fernet master key + HashiCorp Vault. Automatic 90-day rotation, audit trail for every access.
solutions_crypto.strat_subtitle: Each strategy has its own entry rule, position sizing, and stop logic. Multi-strategy diversification reduces correlation drawdown when the market regime shifts.
solutions_crypto.strat1_desc: High-frequency entries riding momentum bursts after volume confirmation + ATR filter.
solutions_crypto.strat2_desc: Order block + Fair Value Gap setups with a minimum 2.0 risk-reward ratio.
solutions_crypto.strat3_desc: Accumulation/distribution phase detection + spring-then-breakout with volume confirmation.
solutions_crypto.strat4_desc: Range-bound futures setups — fade 2σ overshoot back to VWAP.
solutions_crypto.strat5_desc: Trend-following dollar-cost averaging with 4 steps at 2% pullback intervals.
solutions_crypto.strat6_desc: Trend continuation with 2x ATR trailing stop, optimal in trending regimes.
solutions_crypto.pricing_title: Pick the tier that fits your capital.
solutions_crypto.pricing_subtitle: Profit share is auto-deducted from realized monthly PnL. If PnL is negative, only the monthly fee applies.
solutions_crypto.pricing_footer: All tiers include kill switch, per-tier leverage cap, audit log, and real-time dashboard access.
solutions_crypto.tier_basic_desc: Entry tier for traders new to crypto automation.
solutions_crypto.tier_pro_desc: For active traders who need multi-strategy diversification.
solutions_crypto.tier_hnwi_desc: For larger capital with custom pairs & risk profiles.
solutions_crypto.step1_desc: Email registration + identity verification (KYC) per institutional standards. Done within 1-2 business days.
solutions_crypto.step2_desc: Pick Basic / Pro / HNWI on /pricing. Payment via Midtrans (credit card, bank transfer, e-wallet) or Xendit.
solutions_crypto.step3_desc: Create a Binance API key with Read + Futures Trade permissions (NO Withdraw). Submit it in the portal — verification in 5 seconds.
solutions_crypto.step4_desc: Tier strategies run immediately. Monitor at /portal/crypto: live equity, open positions, history, leverage, kill switch.
solutions_crypto.faq_q1: Is this different from regular copy-trading?
solutions_crypto.faq_a1: Yes. Copy-trading mirrors another trader's positions. Our bot runs an independent quantitative algorithm — backtested strategies with a risk overlay, not dependent on a single trader. Performance is reproducible.
solutions_crypto.faq_q2: How is the API key kept secure?
solutions_crypto.faq_a2: We REQUIRE customers to create the API key with "Enable Reading" and "Enable Futures Trade" permissions ONLY — do NOT enable "Enable Withdrawals". Our backend will REJECT any key with withdraw permission. Keys are also encrypted via Fernet + HashiCorp Vault.
solutions_crypto.faq_q3: What's the minimum capital for Crypto Basic?
solutions_crypto.faq_a3: We recommend at least $500 USDT on Binance Futures for Basic ($1,000 for Pro, $10,000 for HNWI). Smaller amounts work but 1% position sizing becomes constrained and compounding suffers.
solutions_crypto.faq_q4: What's the expected win rate and drawdown?
solutions_crypto.faq_a4: Based on 2-year backtest: win rate 55-62% (lower than forex due to volatility), but average risk-reward of 1:2.3 yields a positive profit factor. Historical max drawdown -12.5% during the 2024-Q3 crash.
solutions_crypto.faq_a5: Yes. When submitting the API key there's a "testnet" toggle. The bot runs strategies on Binance Testnet (simulated funds) with the exact same flow. Many customers use one week of testnet before going live.
solutions_crypto.faq_q6: What if Binance is in maintenance or I want to pause?
solutions_crypto.faq_a6: Customers can trigger a self-serve kill switch at /portal/crypto/risk with a reason. The bot halts the dispatcher pass — open positions remain with SL/TP, not force-closed. After maintenance, contact support to lift the kill switch.
solutions_crypto.cta_body: Full onboarding with KYC, payment, and Binance connection can complete within 24 business hours. No contracts — cancel anytime.
solutions_crypto.cta_disclaimer_body: Crypto trading is highly volatile. Past performance does not guarantee future results. This bot is for experienced traders. Do not use funds you cannot afford to lose.

about_page.hero_subtitle: Quantitative trading infrastructure for serious market participants.
about_page.philosophy_p1: BabahAlgo exists because we believe the tools of institutional trading should not be locked behind seven-figure minimums and prime brokerage relationships. The mathematics of market microstructure, the discipline of systematic risk management, and the infrastructure to execute both reliably — these are engineering problems, not privilege problems.
about_page.philosophy_p2: Our approach is deliberately narrow. We trade 14 instruments, not 50. We use three timeframes, not twelve. We run a single strategy architecture with proven edge, not a marketplace of untested ideas. This focus allows us to understand every parameter, every correlation, and every failure mode in our system at a depth that broader platforms cannot match.
about_page.philosophy_p3: We are builders first. Every component of the BabahAlgo platform was designed and built in-house. We do not resell third-party signals or white-label someone else's infrastructure. When something breaks at 3am Tokyo time, we know exactly which line of code to look at because we wrote it.
about_page.principle1_body: We trade 14 instruments, not 50. We use three timeframes, not twelve. Depth of understanding beats superficial coverage.
about_page.principle2_body: Every component — from signal generation to risk framework to client dashboard — is designed and built in-house. No white-label, no resold signals.
about_page.principle3_body: Track record built from internal production databases (forex backend + crypto backend), reconciled against broker statements every quarter. Broker equity statements available on request for institutional clients.
about_page.milestone1_desc: Initial strategy research, backtesting, and validation across 5 years of tick data.
about_page.milestone2_desc: Production deployment with live trading on 14 instruments. Infrastructure buildout.
about_page.milestone3_desc: Auto-execute bot via ZeroMQ bridge to the customer's MetaTrader 5. Affiliate-broker model — customers hold their own funds in their Exness account.
about_page.milestone4_desc: Auto-trading on Binance Spot + USDT-M Futures with 6 institutional strategies + 12-layer risk overlay. Customers hold the API key (Read + Trade only).
about_page.milestone5_desc: 8 API containers (News, Signals, Indicators, Calendar, Market Data, Correlation, Broker Specs, AI Explainability) for external developers. Plus founding-member beta for the first 100 traders.

about_team_page.hero_subtitle: A small team focused on execution quality over headcount.
about_team_page.note: We are a small team by design. In quantitative trading, the quality of decisions matters far more than the number of people making them. Every member of the team has direct operational responsibility and deep context on every aspect of the system. This structure allows us to move quickly, maintain consistency, and keep overhead low — savings that are passed directly to our clients through competitive fee structures.
about_team_page.member1_bio: Abdullah founded BabahAlgo after years of developing and refining quantitative trading strategies for forex and commodities markets. With a software engineering background and an interest in market microstructure, he designed the core strategy architecture, risk framework, and infrastructure that runs the platform. He directly oversees strategy development, system operations, and institutional client relationships. His approach is rooted in statistical rigor, operational discipline, and full transparency.
about_team_page.member2_bio: The quant research team is responsible for new strategy development, walk-forward backtesting, and out-of-sample validation. Every strategy passes a minimum of 3 years in-sample + 1 year out-of-sample before deploying to production. The team also manages strategy decay monitoring, regime detection, and parameter adjustment via Bayesian optimization. Primary outputs: monthly validation reports and signal rationale for every entry.
about_team_page.member3_bio: The infrastructure team maintains 99.95% uptime across the stack — from the sub-2ms MetaTrader 5 execution bridge, the Postgres timeseries database, to the Cloudflare Tunnel ingress. They operate full incident playbooks (kill-switch protocol, MT5 failover, pg backups), 24/7 monitoring with alerting, and deployment runbooks for every production change. The team also performs daily audit chain verification per ADR governance.
about_team_page.member4_bio: Customer-facing function handling institutional KYC onboarding, technical customer support, billing, and compliance reporting. The team ensures every Robot Meta · MT5, Robot Crypto · Binance, VPS License, or Developer APIs subscriber is served according to their tier SLA. They also manage periodic reviews with Institutional API access clients and serve as the main contact for external audits and regulator queries.

about_gov_page.hero_subtitle: Legal structure, compliance framework, and disclosures.
about_gov_page.legal_p1_post: , a commercial partnership (Commanditaire Vennootschap) registered under Indonesian commercial law. CV Babah Digital provides technology services, trading infrastructure, and advisory services to clients across retail, professional, and institutional segments.
about_gov_page.legal_p2: All client-facing services, contracts, and agreements are executed under the CV Babah Digital entity. The company maintains appropriate business licenses and registrations as required by Indonesian law.
about_gov_page.reg_p1_post: , not a futures broker, asset manager, or investment advisor in the regulatory sense. We provide trading technology, signal services, and infrastructure management to clients who maintain their own accounts at regulated brokers.
about_gov_page.reg_p2: For institutional API mandates, trading authority is granted through limited power of attorney arrangements directly between the client and the broker. BabahAlgo does not hold, custody, or transfer client funds at any point.
about_gov_page.reg_p3: We monitor regulatory developments in Indonesia (BAPPEBTI/CoFTRA), ASEAN markets, and international jurisdictions where our clients operate. Our service structure is designed to comply with applicable regulations while providing maximum flexibility to our clients.
about_gov_page.broker_p1_post: , a globally regulated multi-asset broker. Exness is our primary broker partner, selected for superior execution quality, regulatory standing across multiple jurisdictions, segregated client fund accounts, and reliable API infrastructure.
about_gov_page.broker_p2: BabahAlgo continuously evaluates broker performance against our criteria for latency, slippage, fund safety, and regulatory compliance. Exness meets and exceeds these standards across all benchmarks.
about_gov_page.broker_disclosure_body: BabahAlgo receives introducing broker (IB) commissions from Exness for client referrals. These arrangements are disclosed to clients during onboarding and do not affect the execution quality or pricing clients receive. Broker selection is based on objective criteria documented in our broker evaluation framework.
about_gov_page.audit_b1: Performance data reconciliation between platform records and broker statements
about_gov_page.audit_b2: Risk framework parameter validation and stress testing
about_gov_page.audit_b3: Infrastructure security review and access control audit
about_gov_page.audit_b5: Compliance review of marketing materials and client communications
about_gov_page.audit_outro: Audit summaries are available to institutional clients under NDA. Full audit reports can be provided as part of institutional due diligence processes.
about_gov_page.coi_intro: BabahAlgo is committed to identifying, managing, and disclosing conflicts of interest. The following potential conflicts are acknowledged:
about_gov_page.coi_b1_body: We receive IB commissions from partner brokers. Broker selection is based on documented objective criteria and clients are free to use any MT5-compatible broker.
about_gov_page.coi_b2_body: Institutional API mandates include performance-based compensation, which could incentivize excessive risk-taking. This is mitigated by our risk framework, drawdown limits, and high-water mark provisions.
about_gov_page.coi_b3_body: BabahAlgo principals trade the same strategies as clients. This aligns incentives but means principal and client orders may compete for liquidity at the same price levels.
about_gov_page.data_intro: BabahAlgo takes data privacy seriously. Our framework is designed around the principles of data minimization, purpose limitation, and security by default:
about_gov_page.data_b1: We collect only the data necessary to provide our services and comply with legal obligations.
about_gov_page.data_b2: Client trading data is encrypted at rest and in transit using industry-standard encryption.
about_gov_page.data_b3: We do not sell, rent, or share personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.
about_gov_page.data_b4: Clients can request data export or deletion at any time by contacting our compliance team.
about_gov_page.contact_intro: For compliance inquiries, regulatory questions, or to report concerns:
about_gov_page.contact_response: We aim to respond to all compliance inquiries within 2 business days.

solutions_license.hero_title: Dedicated bot infrastructure for professional traders.
solutions_license.hero_subtitle: Your own isolated server running our trading algorithms, configured to your specifications. Full control, full transparency, enterprise-grade reliability.
solutions_license.infra_subtitle: Every VPS license includes enterprise-grade hardware with guaranteed resources.
solutions_license.elig_b1: Professional traders managing $50,000 or more who want dedicated infrastructure without sharing resources.
solutions_license.elig_b2: Trading firms and prop desks looking for turnkey algorithmic trading infrastructure with custom configuration.
solutions_license.elig_b3: Traders who want full operational control and the ability to customize every aspect of the system.
solutions_license.feat1_desc: Your own isolated virtual private server running our trading bot with guaranteed CPU, RAM, and network resources. No shared infrastructure.
solutions_license.feat2_desc: Work with our quant team to configure the bot for your specific instruments, timeframes, risk parameters, and trading schedule.
solutions_license.feat3_desc: The bot connects directly to your MT5 broker account with sub-millisecond execution latency. Supports multiple broker connections.
solutions_license.feat4_desc: Enterprise-grade infrastructure with automated failover, health monitoring, and proactive alerting. Backed by a contractual uptime guarantee.
solutions_license.feat5_desc: Every trade decision, risk check, and execution event is logged and available through your dashboard and API. Complete operational transparency.
solutions_license.feat6_desc: Monthly maintenance includes system updates, security patches, performance optimization, and strategy parameter reviews.
solutions_license.pricing_note: Setup fee covers infrastructure provisioning, strategy configuration, paper-trading validation, and training. Monthly maintenance covers hosting, monitoring, updates, and support. Custom configurations may incur additional fees based on scope.
solutions_license.step1_desc: Book a 30-minute consultation with our team. We will discuss your trading objectives, capital allocation, and infrastructure requirements.
solutions_license.step2_desc: Our quant team conducts a detailed assessment of your requirements: instrument universe, risk tolerance, broker preferences, and operational needs.
solutions_license.step3_desc: We deliver a technical proposal covering system architecture, strategy configuration, risk parameters, pricing, and timeline.
solutions_license.step4_desc: Upon agreement, we provision your dedicated VPS, configure the trading bot, connect to your broker, and run a controlled paper-trading validation phase.
solutions_license.step5_desc: We walk you through the dashboard, alerting system, and operational procedures. Once confirmed, we switch to live trading with your capital.
solutions_license.faq1_a: Each VPS instance includes a minimum of 4 vCPUs, 8GB RAM, 100GB NVMe SSD, and a dedicated 1Gbps network connection. We can scale these resources based on the number of instruments and strategies deployed.
solutions_license.faq2_q: Can I use my own broker?
solutions_license.faq2_a: Yes. The bot supports any MT5-compatible broker. We have pre-tested integrations with several brokers and can validate connectivity with your preferred broker during the discovery phase.
solutions_license.faq3_q: What happens if the server goes down?
solutions_license.faq3_a: Our monitoring system detects failures within 30 seconds and initiates automatic recovery. If a hardware failure occurs, the bot is migrated to backup infrastructure. All open positions have server-side stop-losses as an additional safety layer.
solutions_license.faq4_q: Can I modify the strategy after deployment?
solutions_license.faq4_a: Yes. Strategy parameters can be adjusted at any time through a structured change request process. Material changes go through our validation pipeline before deployment to ensure they do not compromise the risk framework.
solutions_license.faq5_a: The setup fee covers infrastructure provisioning, strategy configuration, and training. It is non-refundable after the discovery phase begins. You may cancel the monthly maintenance at any time with 30 days notice.
solutions_license.cta_body: Schedule a 30-minute call with our team to scope your infrastructure requirements and get a detailed proposal.

solutions_institutional.hero_title: Custom mandates for family offices and funds.
solutions_institutional.hero_subtitle: Bespoke trading mandates with dedicated infrastructure, custom risk parameters, and institutional-grade reporting. Built for allocators who demand full control and transparency.
solutions_institutional.elig_b1: Family offices seeking systematic, uncorrelated return streams with institutional-grade risk management and reporting.
solutions_institutional.elig_b2: Small hedge funds and CTA programs looking for turnkey quantitative trading infrastructure with custom mandate design.
solutions_institutional.elig_b3: High-net-worth individuals with $250,000 or more in liquid assets who want professionally managed, algorithm-driven exposure to FX and commodities markets.
solutions_institutional.feat1_desc: Priority access to our 8 Developer API containers (News, Signals, Indicators, Calendar, Market Data, Correlation, Broker Specs, AI Explainability) with custom rate limits + a dedicated infrastructure lane.
solutions_institutional.feat2_desc: Offer BabahAlgo's technology under your own brand. We provide infrastructure + execution + reporting; you own the customer relationship and branding.
solutions_institutional.feat3_desc: Our engineering team supports direct integration into your OMS/PMS/risk system. WebSocket subscriptions, REST batching, custom data formatters as needed.
solutions_institutional.feat4_desc: Walk-forward + Monte Carlo backtesting on demand for your internal strategies. 5 years of tick data across 14 instruments. White-label PDF report + API automation.
solutions_institutional.feat5_desc: A single point of contact from the engineering team — not generic customer support. Direct access via Telegram + email + scheduled calls. 99.9% SLA.
solutions_institutional.feat6_desc: Monthly + quarterly reports ready for audit, LP distribution, and regulatory filings. Daily audit chain verification + immutable trail per ADR governance.
solutions_institutional.pricing_subtitle: Fee structures are negotiated on a per-mandate basis. Typical arrangements include a management fee and performance fee with high-water mark protection. All terms are documented in the Investment Management Agreement.
solutions_institutional.pricing_note: Schedule a briefing to discuss your specific requirements and receive a tailored proposal.
solutions_institutional.step1_desc: An introductory call to understand your investment mandate, capital allocation, risk appetite, and operational requirements.
solutions_institutional.step2_desc: Our team conducts due diligence on both sides: we share our track record, risk framework, and infrastructure details. You share your compliance requirements and investment criteria.
solutions_institutional.step3_desc: We deliver a comprehensive proposal covering strategy design, risk parameters, fee structure, reporting cadence, and legal framework.
solutions_institutional.step4_desc: Upon agreement, we execute the Investment Management Agreement and establish the legal and operational framework for the mandate.
solutions_institutional.step5_desc: Capital is deposited at the designated broker. Trading begins according to the agreed mandate with full reporting from day one.
solutions_institutional.faq1_a: The starting AUM for institutional mandates is $250,000. This minimum ensures adequate diversification across our instrument universe and proper position sizing within the risk framework.
solutions_institutional.faq2_a: Fee structures are mandate-specific and negotiated during the proposal phase. Typical arrangements include a management fee (1-2% annually) plus performance fee (15-25% of profits above high-water mark). We are flexible on structure.
solutions_institutional.faq3_a: All client funds are held at regulated brokers in segregated accounts under the client entity name. BabahAlgo holds limited power of attorney for trading purposes only. We cannot transfer or withdraw client funds.
solutions_institutional.faq4_a: Yes. We can configure mandates to trade in multiple base currencies and across currency pairs. P&L reporting can be denominated in USD, EUR, GBP, or SGD.
solutions_institutional.faq5_a: BabahAlgo operates as a technology and advisory provider under Indonesian commercial law (CV Babah Digital). For mandates requiring specific regulatory coverage, we work with regulated partner entities in the relevant jurisdictions.
solutions_institutional.cta_body: Schedule an introductory briefing with our institutional team. No commitment, no pressure — just a conversation about whether our capabilities align with your objectives.

solutions_signal.hero_subtitle: Institutional bot that executes directly in your MT5 account via a sub-2ms ZeroMQ bridge. Forex Major, Cross, Gold, and Silver — capital stays with your broker, we never custody funds.
solutions_signal.hero_beta_note: Currently in beta. Free access for founding members through the 90-day live track record (Q3 2026). The pricing tiers below take effect after beta.
solutions_signal.pricing_body: The higher the tier, the more pairs, strategies, and notification channels. Every tier gets the same 12-layer risk framework — that part is non-negotiable.
solutions_signal.tier1_tagline: Entry tier — swing strategy for smaller capital
solutions_signal.tier3_tagline: Premium full-stack — every strategy, every pair
solutions_signal.audience_b1: Retail traders with $1K–$50K who want systematic execution without building their own bot.
solutions_signal.audience_b2: Part-time traders who can't watch charts 24/7 but want high-probability setups still executed.
solutions_signal.audience_b3: Experienced traders who want consistency via auto-execution, free of emotional bias.
solutions_signal.audience_b4: Asset managers / family offices seeking multi-strategy diversification with an auditable execution log.
solutions_signal.feat1_desc: Native ZeroMQ bridge to the customer's MT5. The bot enters, modifies, and closes positions automatically with no manual intervention — capital stays in your broker account.
solutions_signal.feat2_desc: SMC + Wyckoff + Astronacci + AI Momentum + Mean Reversion + Oil/Gas. Strategies run in parallel with multi-timeframe scoring (H4 → H1 → M15 → M5).
solutions_signal.feat3_desc: Spread guard, news blackout, dynamic lot sizing, kill-switch — risk control is the substrate, not a feature. Present on every trade.
solutions_signal.feat4_desc: Tier 2+ gets WhatsApp + Telegram + Email per signal. Tier All-In adds dedicated 24/7 support and custom alert routing.
solutions_signal.feat5_desc: Every entry has a logged rationale: confidence score, triggering indicator, and counterfactual analysis for audit.
solutions_signal.feat6_desc: Real-time equity curve + per-trade audit trail. Sharpe ratio, win rate, profit factor — updated on every execution.
solutions_signal.step1_desc: Free founding-member access during beta. Manual verification by our team, then we send Telegram invites + dashboard credentials.
solutions_signal.step2_desc: Open an MT5 account via our Exness affiliate link — you get a commission discount, capital stays in your account.
solutions_signal.step3_desc: We install ZmqEa in your MT5 terminal and run an end-to-end health check. Once green, the bot starts auto-executing per your tier.
solutions_signal.faq_q1: How is Robot Meta different from a signal-only service?
solutions_signal.faq_a1: Robot Meta auto-executes fully on your MT5 — the bot places orders, modifies SL/TP, and closes positions. Signal-only services send alerts but you must execute manually. Capital stays in your broker account in either scenario.
solutions_signal.faq_q2: Do I have to switch brokers?
solutions_signal.faq_a2: Not required, but we recommend our partner broker Exness via affiliate link for a commission discount. Our ZeroMQ bridge is compatible with any MT5 broker that allows EA / automated trading.
solutions_signal.faq_q3: What's the minimum capital to start?
solutions_signal.faq_a3: Tier Swing $19/mo: $1K minimum recommended for optimal position sizing. Tier Scalping $79: $5K minimum. Tier All-In $299: $25K minimum for multi-strategy diversification.
solutions_signal.faq_a4: Every trade passes through a 12-layer framework: pre-trade (spread guard, dynamic lot sizing, news blackout), in-trade (protective stop-loss, max hold time, breakeven trail), post-system (cooldown, catastrophic breaker, kill-switch). Details at /platform/risk-framework.
solutions_signal.faq_q5: Is there a demo or free trial?
solutions_signal.faq_a5: Yes. Robot Meta · Demo is free for 7 days on your MT5 demo account — the bot fully executes but on paper money. Visit /demo to sign up.
solutions_signal.faq_a6: Yes, every tier is month-to-month with no lock-in. Cancel anytime before the next billing date. The bot auto-detaches from your MT5 after cancellation.
solutions_signal.cta_title: Ready to start with Robot Meta?
solutions_signal.cta_body: Sign up as a founding member free during beta — or try the demo first on an MT5 demo account, no real capital at risk.

contact_page.agenda4_desc: No pushy follow-ups, no hard close. We explain, you evaluate. Move forward or not — both are fine.

demo_page.hero_note: No credit card. Email verification is enough. Demo expires after 7 days (auto-archived); the Indicator is permanent.
demo_page.isolation_title: Demo = full simulation, not real capital
demo_page.isolation_body_part1: Trades on MT5 demo / Binance Testnet are 100% simulated. Never touch real capital, not shown in our public track record, and not counted toward verified performance. Demo equity is always tagged
demo_page.isolation_body_part2: across the dashboard to avoid confusion.
demo_page.tracks_subtitle: Feel free to try all three — many founding members evaluate Robot Meta + Robot Crypto in parallel before picking a live tier. The Indicator is permanently free as a manual-analysis companion.

platform_overview.hero_lead: BabahAlgo is a quantitative trading platform combining multi-strategy execution, AI-driven analysis, and institutional-grade risk management into a single, auditable pipeline.
platform_overview.pillars_lead: The platform is organized around three foundational disciplines. Each operates independently but reinforces the others.
platform_overview.pillar_strategy_desc: Six independently validated strategies spanning Smart Money Concepts, Wyckoff accumulation-distribution, Astronacci harmonic geometry, AI-driven momentum, energy-sector macro plays, and multi-day SMC swing positioning. Each strategy operates on a strict multi-timeframe confluence model.
platform_overview.pillar_technology_desc: A purpose-built execution pipeline anchored by Gemini 2.5 Flash for real-time analysis and confidence scoring, a ZeroMQ bridge delivering sub-2ms order routing, and MetaTrader 5 for broker connectivity. The entire stack runs on isolated VPS infrastructure behind Cloudflare Tunnel.
platform_overview.pillar_risk_desc: Capital preservation is not a feature — it is the architecture. Twelve independent risk layers operate simultaneously: dynamic lot sizing, catastrophic breakers, daily loss limits, spread guards, news blackout windows, session drawdown monitors, and more.
platform_overview.pipeline_lead: Every trade follows a deterministic pipeline with no manual intervention.
platform_overview.pipeline_step_1_desc: Real-time tick aggregation and candle construction
platform_overview.pipeline_step_2_desc: Gemini 2.5 Flash analysis, confidence scoring, bias
platform_overview.pipeline_step_4_desc: 12-layer validation: lot sizing, drawdown, spread, session
platform_overview.pipeline_step_6_desc: Order execution via broker liquidity pool
platform_overview.pipeline_step_7_desc: Fill confirmation, position tracking, equity reconciliation
platform_overview.instruments_lead: 14 instruments across four asset classes, selected for liquidity depth, spread efficiency, and strategy compatibility.
platform_overview.docs_methodology_desc: Complete description of strategy logic, entry/exit criteria, backtesting methodology, and walk-forward validation results.
platform_overview.docs_whitepaper_desc: Infrastructure architecture, security model, execution latency benchmarks, and formal risk framework specifications.

platform_technology.hero_title: AI engine, execution infrastructure, and monitoring.
platform_technology.hero_lead: Every component in the BabahAlgo technology stack is purpose-built for automated trading. There are no general-purpose frameworks, no shared hosting, and no third-party signal dependencies. The system owns the full pipeline from analysis to execution.
platform_technology.ai_card_p1: The AI advisor uses Google's Gemini 2.5 Flash model to perform real-time market analysis for each monitored instrument. Every 15 minutes, the system submits a structured prompt containing current OHLCV data, recent price action context, active position state, and recent trade history. The model returns a JSON-structured response with directional bias, confidence score, key support and resistance levels, timeframe-specific analysis, and risk commentary.
platform_technology.ai_card_p2: Confidence scoring operates on a 0-100 scale. Scores below 70 suppress new entries for the pair. Scores between 70-80 require full multi-timeframe technical confluence. Scores above 80 allow entry with reduced confluence requirements. A neutral bias reading pauses all new entries regardless of technical signals.
platform_technology.exec_zeromq_p1: Order routing between the strategy engine and MetaTrader 5 is handled by a custom ZeroMQ bridge. ZeroMQ is a high-performance asynchronous messaging library that provides socket-level communication without the overhead of HTTP or REST protocols. The bridge serializes trade commands (open, modify, close) into compact binary messages and transmits them to the MT5 expert advisor via TCP sockets on localhost.
platform_technology.exec_zeromq_p2: Measured end-to-end latency from signal generation to order submission is consistently below 2 milliseconds in production. This includes message serialization, socket transmission, deserialization, and MT5 order queue insertion. Actual fill latency depends on broker infrastructure and is typically 50-200ms additional.
platform_technology.exec_mt5_body: The MT5 expert advisor operates as a lightweight order executor. It receives commands from the ZeroMQ bridge, validates them against the broker's trading conditions (symbol availability, margin requirements, trading hours), and submits them to the broker's liquidity pool. Position management — including stop-loss modification, trailing stop ratcheting, and forced closure — is handled entirely through the bridge. The EA maintains no independent trading logic, ensuring the strategy engine is the single source of truth.
platform_technology.infra_zerotrust_body: All network access to the trading infrastructure is routed through Cloudflare Tunnel. There are no open ports, no public IP addresses exposed, and no direct SSH access from the internet. Administrative access requires Cloudflare Access authentication with hardware key verification. The tunnel provides DDoS protection, TLS termination, and access logging as a byproduct of its architecture.
platform_technology.infra_vps_body: The trading engine runs on a dedicated VPS with no shared tenancy. The server is provisioned with guaranteed CPU cores, dedicated RAM, and SSD storage to eliminate resource contention. The operating system is hardened with minimal attack surface — only the services required for trading operation are installed and running.
platform_technology.infra_db_body: All trading state — positions, signals, risk parameters, audit logs, account metrics — is persisted in PostgreSQL. The database provides ACID compliance, point-in-time recovery, and structured query capability for post-trade analysis. The entire application stack is containerized with Docker, enabling reproducible deployments, version-locked dependencies, and rapid rollback in the event of a deployment issue.
platform_technology.ops_health_body: Automated health checks run every 60 seconds, verifying connectivity to the broker, ZeroMQ bridge responsiveness, database availability, AI advisor reachability, and system resource utilization. Any check failure triggers an immediate alert to the operations team and initiates a pre-defined response protocol.
platform_technology.ops_killswitch_body: A hardware-level kill switch can halt all trading activity within seconds. When activated, the system closes all open positions at market, cancels all pending orders, and disables the strategy engine. The kill switch can be triggered manually through the admin dashboard, automatically by the catastrophic breaker risk layer, or remotely via an authenticated API endpoint.
platform_technology.ops_audit_body: Every action in the system is logged with a timestamp, actor identification, action type, and full payload. This includes trade signals generated, risk checks passed/failed, orders submitted, fills received, position modifications, and administrative actions. Logs are stored in PostgreSQL with a 90-day online retention and archived to cold storage for compliance purposes. All logs are available for query through the admin dashboard.

platform_risk.hero_lead: Risk management is not a module bolted onto the trading engine — it is the architecture. Twelve independent layers operate simultaneously, each designed to catch a specific class of risk that the others may miss. No single layer failure can result in uncontrolled loss. Every layer logs its decisions for full auditability.
platform_risk.layer_1_desc: Every trade is sized relative to current account equity, not the initial deposit. The system calculates the maximum allowable lot size based on the distance to the protective stop, the current equity balance, and the tier-specific risk-per-trade percentage (typically 0.5-1.5% of equity). As equity grows, position sizes scale proportionally. As equity declines, sizes contract automatically, creating a natural deceleration effect during drawdown periods. This prevents the compounding of losses that destroys accounts using fixed lot sizing.
platform_risk.layer_2_desc: If total account equity declines by a predefined percentage from its high-water mark (configurable per tier, typically 10-15%), the catastrophic breaker activates. Upon activation, all open positions are immediately closed at market, all pending orders are cancelled, and the strategy engine is disabled. The system enters a lockdown state that requires manual administrative intervention to resume. This layer exists to prevent catastrophic loss scenarios that could arise from correlated market events, infrastructure failures, or sustained adverse conditions.
platform_risk.layer_3_desc: A separate daily loss limit operates independently of the catastrophic breaker. If realized plus unrealized losses for the current trading day exceed the daily threshold (typically 2-3% of starting daily equity), all positions are closed and no new trades are permitted until the next trading day. This prevents a single bad day from consuming a disproportionate share of the monthly risk budget. The daily limit resets at 00:00 server time.
platform_risk.layer_4_desc: No instrument may have more than one active position at any time. This prevents pyramiding into a single pair, which creates concentrated exposure to a single directional bet. If a strategy generates a new signal for a pair that already has an open position, the signal is logged but not executed. This rule has no exceptions — it applies regardless of signal strength, AI confidence, or strategy type.
platform_risk.layer_5_desc: The total number of simultaneously open positions is capped based on the account tier. Entry-tier accounts are limited to 3 concurrent positions. Professional tiers may allow up to 6. Institutional tiers up to 10. These limits ensure that total portfolio exposure remains within manageable bounds and that margin utilization does not approach critical levels. When the position limit is reached, new signals are queued and executed only when existing positions close.
platform_risk.layer_6_desc: Every position has a protective stop-loss order placed immediately upon entry. The stop is calculated based on the strategy-specific methodology (e.g., beyond the order block for SMC, beyond the spring wick for Wyckoff). Once a position reaches 1R profit (unrealized profit equals the initial risk), the stop is ratcheted to breakeven plus spread. This ensures that a winning trade cannot become a losing trade after reaching its first profit milestone.
platform_risk.layer_7_desc: The system maintains a calendar of high-impact economic events (NFP, FOMC, ECB, BOE decisions, CPI releases, GDP reports). During a configurable window surrounding each event (typically 15 minutes before to 5 minutes after), no new positions are opened for affected currency pairs. Existing positions are not closed automatically, but trailing stops are tightened. This prevents entering trades during periods of extreme volatility and unpredictable price action where technical analysis loses reliability.
platform_risk.layer_8_desc: All open positions are closed before the market closes for the weekend (typically Friday 16:55 server time). Weekend gaps — the difference between Friday close and Sunday open prices — can be substantial and unpredictable, driven by geopolitical events, natural disasters, or policy announcements that occur while markets are closed. By closing all positions before the weekend, the system eliminates gap risk entirely. No positions are carried over weekends under any circumstances.
platform_risk.layer_9_desc: No position may remain open for longer than 4 hours. This hard cap applies regardless of whether the position is in profit or loss. The rationale is twofold: first, extended holds increase exposure to regime changes and event risk. Second, strategies that require more than 4 hours to reach their target are likely experiencing adverse conditions where the original thesis has weakened. Positions that reach the time limit are closed at market, and the strategy may re-enter on a fresh signal if conditions warrant.
platform_risk.layer_10_desc: After a configurable number of consecutive losses (typically 3), the system enters a cooldown period during which no new trades are opened for the affected strategy. The cooldown duration scales with the streak length: 3 losses triggers a 30-minute pause, 4 losses triggers 60 minutes, 5 losses triggers a session-wide pause for that strategy. This prevents the system from continuing to trade during conditions that are clearly adverse for the active strategy, allowing market conditions to evolve before resuming.
platform_risk.layer_11_desc: Before any order is submitted to the broker, the system checks the current bid-ask spread against a per-instrument threshold. If the spread exceeds the threshold (e.g., 3 pips for EURUSD, 5 pips for XAUUSD, 8 pips for XNGUSD), the order is rejected and logged. Wide spreads typically occur during low-liquidity periods (session transitions, pre-news windows, early Asian session) and indicate unfavorable execution conditions. The spread guard ensures the system only trades when execution quality meets minimum standards.
platform_risk.layer_12_desc: In addition to the daily loss limit, a per-session drawdown guard monitors equity during each trading session (Asian, London, New York). If losses within a single session exceed the session threshold (typically 1-1.5% of equity), trading is paused for the remainder of that session. This prevents a single volatile session from consuming the entire daily risk budget, preserving capacity for the remaining sessions where conditions may be more favorable.

platform_execution.hero_lead: Execution quality determines whether a valid signal becomes a profitable trade. The BabahAlgo execution infrastructure is engineered for minimal latency, maximum reliability, and complete auditability at every stage of the order lifecycle.
platform_execution.latency_card_p1: The ZeroMQ bridge is the critical link between the strategy engine (running in Docker on Linux) and MetaTrader 5 (running on Windows). Communication occurs over TCP sockets on localhost, eliminating network latency entirely. Messages are serialized using a compact binary protocol that encodes trade commands (OPEN, MODIFY, CLOSE) with full parameters (symbol, direction, lot size, stop-loss, take-profit) in under 100 bytes per message.
platform_execution.latency_card_p2: The bridge operates in a request-reply pattern: the strategy engine sends a command and blocks until the MT5 EA confirms receipt and processing. This synchronous pattern ensures order integrity — no command is lost or duplicated. Measured round-trip latency in production consistently falls below 2 milliseconds.
platform_execution.broker_p1: MetaTrader 5 serves as the broker connectivity layer. The MT5 expert advisor is a stateless order executor — it receives commands from the ZeroMQ bridge, validates them against the broker's trading conditions, and submits them to the liquidity pool. The EA performs pre-submission checks including symbol availability, minimum lot size compliance, margin sufficiency, and trading hours validation.
platform_execution.broker_p2: Order types supported include market orders (immediate execution), pending limit orders, and stop orders. All orders include attached stop-loss and take-profit levels set at the time of submission. Position modifications (stop adjustment, trailing stop ratchet) are handled as separate MODIFY commands through the bridge.
platform_execution.broker_p3: Fill confirmations are returned to the strategy engine through the same ZeroMQ channel, including the actual fill price, slippage (if any), and the broker-assigned ticket number. This data is logged to PostgreSQL for reconciliation and slippage analysis.
platform_execution.vps_hardware_body: The trading engine runs on a dedicated VPS with guaranteed resources: no shared CPU cores, no memory overcommitment, and NVMe SSD storage for database I/O. The server is located in a data center with redundant power, cooling, and network connectivity. Physical proximity to major broker servers minimizes network latency for the final leg of order transmission.
platform_execution.vps_security_body: All external access is routed through Cloudflare Tunnel. The VPS has no publicly exposed ports. Administrative access requires Cloudflare Access authentication. Internal communication between Docker containers occurs on an isolated bridge network. The MT5 terminal communicates with the broker through its native encrypted protocol, and with the strategy engine exclusively through the localhost ZeroMQ socket.
platform_execution.ops_health_body: A dedicated monitoring service polls all critical components every 60 seconds: ZeroMQ bridge connectivity, MT5 terminal status, broker connection state, PostgreSQL availability, and system resource utilization (CPU, memory, disk). Each check has a defined healthy/degraded/critical threshold. Degraded status triggers a warning notification. Critical status triggers the automated response protocol.
platform_execution.ops_response_intro: When a critical health check failure is detected, the system follows a deterministic response sequence:
platform_execution.ops_response_step_1: Immediately pause all new trade signals
platform_execution.ops_response_step_3: If recovery fails within 30 seconds, close all open positions at market
platform_execution.ops_response_step_4: Disable the strategy engine and enter safe mode
platform_execution.ops_response_step_5: Send critical alert to the operations team with full diagnostic payload
platform_execution.ops_response_step_6: Log the entire incident timeline for post-mortem analysis
platform_execution.ops_uptime_body: The system targets 99.9% uptime during market hours (Sunday 17:00 ET to Friday 17:00 ET). Scheduled maintenance windows are limited to weekends when markets are closed. Unscheduled downtime triggers the automated response protocol described above, ensuring that positions are never left unmanaged during an outage.

platform_instruments.hero_lead: Each instrument is selected based on liquidity depth, spread efficiency, strategy compatibility, and historical performance characteristics. The platform does not trade thinly-traded or exotic instruments.
platform_instruments.desc_forex: Seven major and minor currency pairs selected for deep liquidity, tight spreads, and strong trending characteristics. These pairs form the core of the SMC, Wyckoff, Astronacci, and AI Momentum strategies.
platform_instruments.desc_metals: Gold and silver provide portfolio diversification and safe-haven exposure. These instruments respond to macro risk sentiment, inflation expectations, and central bank policy, offering uncorrelated return streams.
platform_instruments.desc_energy: WTI Crude, Brent Crude, and Natural Gas are traded through the specialized Oil & Gas Macro strategy, which integrates inventory data, OPEC dynamics, and seasonal demand patterns.
platform_instruments.desc_crypto: Bitcoin and Ethereum are monitored for high-conviction momentum setups. Due to their higher volatility, position sizes are reduced and spread guard thresholds are elevated.
platform_instruments.criteria_intro: Instruments are evaluated quarterly against four criteria before inclusion or removal from the active universe:
platform_instruments.criteria_liquidity_body: Average daily volume must exceed minimum thresholds to ensure consistent fill quality and manageable slippage.
platform_instruments.criteria_spread_body: Average spread during active trading hours must remain below the strategy-specific threshold to maintain positive expected value after transaction costs.
platform_instruments.criteria_compatibility_body: The instrument must demonstrate technical characteristics (trending behavior, mean-reversion, or event-driven patterns) compatible with at least one active strategy.
platform_instruments.criteria_performance_body: Backtested and walk-forward results for the instrument must meet minimum performance thresholds (win rate, risk-reward ratio, drawdown limits) before live deployment.

platform_strategies.hero_lead: Six independently validated strategies, each operating on a strict multi-timeframe confluence model. Every strategy is backtested across a minimum of 24 months of historical data and validated through walk-forward analysis before deployment.
platform_strategies.hero_disclaimer: Win-rate values below are from in-house backtest (24-month walk-forward, Q1 2024–Q4 2025). Live track record publishes after Q3 2026 — past performance does not guarantee future results.
platform_strategies.smc_desc: Smart Money Concepts applied to intraday timeframes. Identifies institutional order flow through order blocks, fair value gaps, and liquidity sweeps. Targets high-probability entries where retail liquidity is harvested by institutional participants.
platform_strategies.wyckoff_desc: Classical Wyckoff methodology automated for modern markets. Detects accumulation and distribution phases through volume-price analysis, spring/upthrust identification, and phase transition confirmation.
platform_strategies.astronacci_desc: Proprietary harmonic geometry framework combining Fibonacci confluence zones with astro-cyclical timing windows. Identifies high-probability reversal points through multi-layer geometric alignment.
platform_strategies.ai-momentum_desc: Machine learning-driven momentum classification using Gemini 2.5 Flash for real-time sentiment and structure analysis. Combines AI confidence scoring with traditional momentum indicators for trend continuation entries.
platform_strategies.oil-gas_desc: Energy-sector specialist strategy for USOIL, UKOIL, and XNGUSD. Integrates inventory data cycles, geopolitical risk scoring, and seasonal demand patterns with technical confluence for macro-driven entries.
platform_strategies.smc-swing_desc: Multi-day Smart Money positioning targeting higher-timeframe order blocks and liquidity pools. Designed for larger moves with wider stops, lower frequency, and higher reward-to-risk ratios.

platform_strategy_detail.section_confluence_lead: Every entry requires alignment across multiple timeframes. No single timeframe can generate a trade independently.
platform_strategy_detail.smc_subtitle: Institutional order flow applied to intraday timeframes
platform_strategy_detail.wyckoff_subtitle: Classical volume-price methodology automated for modern markets
platform_strategy_detail.astronacci_subtitle: Fibonacci confluence zones with astro-cyclical timing alignment
platform_strategy_detail.ai-momentum_subtitle: Machine learning-driven momentum classification with AI confidence scoring
platform_strategy_detail.oil-gas_subtitle: Energy-sector specialist strategy for crude oil and natural gas
platform_strategy_detail.smc-swing_subtitle: Multi-day Smart Money positioning on higher timeframes

research_page.hero_lead: Notes from the desk on markets, models, and execution.
research_page.briefs_desc: Actionable per-pair analysis with S/R levels, SND zones, and trade ideas — updated 3x daily.
research_page.newsletter_lead: No marketing, no spam. Four times a year we share our latest research on strategy development, market microstructure, and systematic trading. Unsubscribe anytime.
research_page.newsletter_disclaimer: By subscribing you agree to our privacy policy. We will never share your email.
